source_pr.title: plan,statistics: don't forget to close domain in testing
source_pr.body:
Domain have many background goroutines bind to it.
If we forget to close it:
1. make leak may fail
2. make race may fail, because the background goroutines may still visiting store after store is closed.

symptoms: 2. make race may fail, because the background goroutines may still visiting store after store is closed.
failure_signature: 2. make race may fail, because the background goroutines may still visiting store after store is closed.
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. This PR stabilizes it by: plan,statistics: don't forget to close domain in testing.
fix_pattern: plan,statistics: don't forget to close domain in testing

evidence: evidence: 2. make race may fail, because the background goroutines may still visiting store after store is closed.
files: plan/cbo_test.go, plan/dag_plan_test.go, plan/explain_test.go, plan/resolver_test.go, plan/typeinfer_test.go, plan/validator_test.go, statistics/selectivity_test.go, util/testleak/leaktest.go
